failures.description: The Executor misread or misapplied the sorted ProductCatalogSearch result and answered with item 2243454707 at $164.46 instead of the cheapest item, 1240311797 at $137.17.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The correct tool call was made and the tool returned 11 available electric kettles sorted by ascending price. The first item in the returned evidence is item_id 1240311797 priced at $137.17, so the required information was available before synthesis. At index 4, the Executor used the tool output incorrectly and selected item_id 2243454707 priced at $164.46, which is actually the last and most expensive item in the sorted list. This is not an unsupported invention because the item exists in the tool output; the failure is the incorrect interpretation/use of that output.
